title: Zetadeck | Build the platform your business runs on
excerpt: Zetadeck is a startup operations center: tasks, CRM, docs, and finance on one shared data spine, so your pipeline and runway are live instead of a stale spreadsheet, with no data drift and an AI co-pilot that works from your real numbers. Free for up to 3 people.
content_html:
Don't fight your tools. Run everything on one deck.

Zetadeck puts your tasks, customers, docs, and bank balance in one workspace, with an AI that reads all of it. Turn on the modules you need, skip the ones you don't.

Free forever for up to 5 people · no credit card required

SOUND FAMILIAR?

Your week, before and after one deck.

If you run a small team, you are also the one keeping ten tools in sync. Here is the same week, twice.

MODULES · A FEW HIGHLIGHTS

Every tool is a module. Every module is a switch.

One login, one permission model, one set of numbers. A few of the modules are below. Flip any of them on or off, pages adapt so nothing looks half-empty.

Free covers the core including the AI agent. Pro adds automation and ten times the AI credits. Admins flip modules in Settings.

PRICING

Start free. Add layers as you grow.

FREE

$0

  • 5 included seats
  • Tasks, CRM, docs, finance
  • 500 AI credits / month

Start free

PROPOPULAR

$8/ seat / mo (yearly)

  • Everything in Free
  • 5000 AI credits / seat
  • Automation workflows
  • Roles, permissions, encrypted Vault

Start Pro

ADD-ON MODULES

Coming soon

  • Extend Pro with paid modules
  • Priced per module
  • Tell us what you need

See roadmap

See full pricing →

BUILT FOR YOUR KIND OF TEAM

Same deck, your vocabulary.

Setup templates and guides shaped for how your team actually works, with a starter board, pipeline, and docs included.

FAQ

Before you start.

Is my data secure?

Each workspace lives in an isolated tenant enforced at the database layer, so one customer can never read another's rows. Vault secrets are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage and decrypted only on the server, never in the browser. Zetadeck runs on Supabase with data hosted in the United States, delivered through Cloudflare.

Can I export my data if I leave?

Yes. You can export your workspace data at any time from Settings. If you close your account, we delete your workspace data on request within 30 days.

How do I migrate from my current tools?

Import leads and contacts from CSV today, with more importers on the way. Docs are markdown friendly, so content pasted from tools like Notion keeps its formatting. On a Pro plan we will also help you migrate hands-on.

What does the Free plan include?

A full workspace with tasks, CRM, docs, and finance for up to 5 people, plus 500 AI actions each month. No credit card required.

What kind of support do you offer?

Every workspace, Free or Pro, gets the in-app support ticket system and email support. Pro workspaces get priority support.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes. Cancel whenever you like and your plan stays active until the end of the billing period. We do not charge again after that. Partial periods are not refunded.

Something else on your mind? Send us a message.

GET STARTED

Spin up the deck your business runs on.

Free forever for up to 3 people. Upgrade only when you outgrow it.

Free forever for up to 3 people · no credit card required

TALK TO US

Questions before you start?

Ask about pricing, security, or whether Zetadeck fits your team. Send a note, or grab 15 minutes and we'll walk through your stack together.

Email: hello@zetadeck.com

Already a customer? Open a ticket from your workspace’s Support page.

content_html_zh:
不要与你的工具作斗争。 在一张牌上运行所有内容。

Zetadeck 将您的任务、客户、文档和银行余额放在一个工作区中，并由人工智能读取所有这些内容。 打开您需要的模块，跳过不需要的模块。

最多 5 人永久免费·无需信用卡

听起来很熟悉吗？

你的一周，在一副牌之前和之后。

如果您管理一个小团队，那么您也是保持十个工具同步的人。 这是同一周的两次。

模块·一些亮点

每个工具都是一个模块。 每个模块都是一个开关。

一次登录、一种权限模型、一组号码。 下面是一些模块。 打开或关闭其中任何一个，页面都会适应，所以没有什么看起来是半空的。

免费涵盖了包括AI代理在内的核心。 Pro 增加了自动化和十倍的 AI 积分。 管理员在“设置”中翻转模块。

定价

开始免费。 随着你的成长添加层。

FREE

$0

  • 包含 5 个座位
  • 任务、CRM、文档、财务
  • 500 个 AI 积分/月

免费开始

普罗大众

$8/座/月（每年）

  • 一切都是免费的
  • 5000 个 AI 积分/席位
  • 自动化工作流程
  • 角色、权限、加密保管库

开始专业版

附加模块

即将推出

  • 使用付费模块扩展 Pro
  • 按模块定价
  • 告诉我们您需要什么

查看路线图

查看完整定价 →

专为您的团队打造

同样的牌组，你的词汇量。

根据您的团队实际工作方式设置模板和指南，其中包括入门板、管道和文档。

FAQ

在开始之前。

Is my data secure?

每个工作区都位于数据库层强制执行的独立租户中，因此一个客户永远无法读取另一个客户的行。 Vault 机密在存储之前使用 AES-256-GCM 进行加密，并且仅在服务器上解密，而不会在浏览器中解密。 Zetadeck 在 Supabase 上运行，数据托管在美国，并通过 Cloudflare 交付。

Can I export my data if I leave?

是的。 您可以随时从“设置”导出工作区数据。 如果您关闭帐户，我们会在 30 天内根据要求删除您的工作区数据。

How do I migrate from my current tools?

立即从 CSV 导入潜在客户和联系人，更多导入商即将推出。 文档是 Markdown 友好的，因此从 Notion 等工具粘贴的内容会保持其格式。 在专业版计划中，我们还将帮助您亲自进行迁移。

What does the Free plan include?

完整的工作空间，包含最多可容纳 5 人的任务、CRM、文档和财务，以及每月 500 个 AI 操作。 无需信用卡。

What kind of support do you offer?

每个工作区，无论是免费还是专业版，都可以获得应用内支持票证系统和电子邮件支持。 专业工作区获得优先支持。

Can I cancel anytime?

是的。 您可以随时取消，您的计划将一直有效，直到计费周期结束。 此后我们不再收费。 部分期间不予退还。

你还有别的想法吗？ 给我们留言。

开始吧

启动您的业务运营平台。

最多 3 人永久免费。 仅当您不再需要时才升级。

最多 3 人永久免费·无需信用卡

与我们交谈

开始之前有疑问吗？

询问价格、安全性或 Zetadeck 是否适合您的团队。 发送一条信息，或者抽出 1​​5 分钟时间，我们将一起检查您的堆栈。

电子邮件：hello@zetadeck.com

已经是客户？ 从工作区的支持页面打开票证。
